blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,301 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
